name: SubLayout
description: A plugin to replicate, load, and save layouts of hierarchical sheets.
description_full: Supports layout re-use of hierarchical sheets, including schematic-less netlist flows that have hierarchical tstamp data. Can replicate sheets within the same board (channelization), or save and load sheets to .kicad_pcb files that can be edited separately. Grouping-aware. Auto-detects instances based on sheetnames. Allows replication based on tstamp or relative refdes, including a best-effort attempt when the source and destination don't match.
